message:
fix(google): fix UTF-8 panic in body preview and correct request telemetry

Fix two bugs in google-chat, google-docs, google-sheets, and
google-workspace-events connectors:

1. Replace panicking byte-slice truncation (&body[..body.len().min(200)])
   with chars().take(200).collect() to prevent panic on multi-byte UTF-8
   boundaries in error logging.

2. Fix record_request telemetry: previously recorded success before
   execution, then re-recorded failure inline in each error branch.
   Refactored to call record_request(result.is_ok()) once after the
   operation completes, ensuring accurate success/failure accounting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
